description_long: This is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, symmetrical blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears to be forged from a dark, metallic material, giving it a matte, almost black finish. The crossguard is simple and straight, extending horizontally to provide hand protection, and is also made of the same dark metal. The handle is cylindrical and straight, ending in a faceted, diamond-shaped pommel that matches the rest of the sword's dark aesthetic. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements on the blade, guard, or handle, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The overall proportions suggest a weapon designed for both cutting and thrusting, suitable for use in close combat.
description: A long, double-edged, straight sword with a dark metallic finish, simple crossguard, and faceted pommel. The design is utilitarian with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and faceted pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard and pommel visible in silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and pommel from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle with faceted pommel, dark metal, no visible grip texture
